abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Unexpected Dismount
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that damaged this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to replace to itself with Lucas McCabe, Dismounted Hunter, heal 2, and then move up to 2".

actions.name: High-Stepping
actions.effects: This action deals +1 damage if it was generated by the Charge action.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

triggers.name: Rear Up
triggers.text: Once per activation. Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (r)2" of this model.

actions.name: Netgun
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4". Then, if the target is an enemy, it gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Ride with Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.

actions.name: Dismount
actions.effects: Replace this model with Lucas McCabe, Dismounted Hunter. Then, this model heals 2.

triggers.name: Forgot That Was There!
triggers.text: Attach an Artifact upgrade to this model.
